text:
Question: In photosynthesis 光合作用, which gas is commonly released?
Item serial: 1
Options:
A. Oxygen
B. Nitrogen
C. Methane
D. Helium
label: A

text:
Question: A catalyst 催化剂 mainly changes what in a reaction?
Item serial: 2
Options:
(A) Total mass
(B) Reaction rate
(C) Element identity
(D) Gravity
label: B

text:
Question: Which term matches 细胞核 in an animal cell?
Item serial: 3
Options:
A. Ribosome
B. Cell wall
C. Nucleus
D. Chloroplast
label: C

text:
Question: Thermal expansion 热膨胀 means a material usually does what when heated?
Item serial: 4
Options:
(A) Becomes weightless
(B) Turns magnetic
(C) Stops moving
(D) Expands
label: D
